$comment: Global brain-awareness. SessionStart command output is injected into session context: if a local brain exists it loads the index; otherwise it instructs Claude to pull the brain from the agent's Google Drive via realtor-brain-sync. NOTE: excluded from the zip-upload test build (zip validation rejected a hooks variant); verify live via the GitHub-marketplace install. Drive PUSH after writes is handled by skills per the Brain Contract, not by a hook.

hooks.command: if [ -f "$HOME/realtor-brain/brain.md" ]; then echo '=== REALTOR AI BRAIN (read before substantive work) ==='; cat "$HOME/realtor-brain/brain.md"; else echo 'NOTE: This user may have a Realtor AI Brain stored in their Google Drive (folder: Realtor AI Brain). Before substantive work, use the realtor-brain-sync skill to pull it to ~/realtor-brain/ and read brain.md so all work reflects who they are. If no brain exists in Drive, suggest they say: Set up my Brain.'; fi
